잠언 23:1.content: When you sit to eat with a ruler, consider diligently what is before you;

잠언 23:2.content: put a knife to your throat, if you are a man given to appetite.

잠언 23:3.content: Don’t be desirous of his dainties, since they are deceitful food.

잠언 23:4.content: Don’t weary yourself to be rich. In your wisdom, show restraint.

잠언 23:5.content: Why do you set your eyes on that which is not? For it certainly sprouts wings like an eagle and flies in the sky.

잠언 23:6.content: Don’t eat the food of him who has a stingy eye, and don’t crave his delicacies:

잠언 23:7.content: for as he thinks about the cost, so he is. “Eat and drink!” he says to you, but his heart is not with you.

잠언 23:8.content: The morsel which you have eaten you shall vomit up, and lose your good words.

잠언 23:9.content: Don’t speak in the ears of a fool, for he will despise the wisdom of your words.

잠언 23:10.content: Don’t move the ancient boundary stone. Don’t encroach on the fields of the fatherless,

잠언 23:11.content: for their Defender is strong. He will plead their case against you.

잠언 23:12.content: Apply your heart to instruction, and your ears to the words of knowledge.

잠언 23:13.content: Don’t withhold correction from a child. If you punish him with the rod, he will not die.

잠언 23:14.content: Punish him with the rod, and save his soul from Sheol.

잠언 23:15.content: My son, if your heart is wise, then my heart will be glad, even mine.

잠언 23:16.content: Yes, my heart will rejoice when your lips speak what is right.

잠언 23:17.content: Don’t let your heart envy sinners, but rather fear Yahweh all day long.

잠언 23:18.content: Indeed surely there is a future hope, and your hope will not be cut off.

잠언 23:19.content: Listen, my son, and be wise, and keep your heart on the right path!

잠언 23:20.content: Don’t be among ones drinking too much wine, or those who gorge themselves on meat:

잠언 23:21.content: for the drunkard and the glutton shall become poor; and drowsiness clothes them in rags.

잠언 23:22.content: Listen to your father who gave you life, and don’t despise your mother when she is old.

잠언 23:23.content: Buy the truth, and don’t sell it. Get wisdom, discipline, and understanding.

잠언 23:24.content: The father of the righteous has great joy. Whoever fathers a wise child delights in him.

잠언 23:25.content: Let your father and your mother be glad! Let her who bore you rejoice!

잠언 23:26.content: My son, give me your heart; and let your eyes keep in my ways.

잠언 23:27.content: For a prostitute is a deep pit; and a wayward wife is a narrow well.

잠언 23:28.content: Yes, she lies in wait like a robber, and increases the unfaithful among men.

잠언 23:29.content: Who has woe? Who has sorrow? Who has strife? Who has complaints? Who has needless bruises? Who has bloodshot eyes?

잠언 23:30.content: Those who stay long at the wine; those who go to seek out mixed wine.

잠언 23:31.content: Don’t look at the wine when it is red, when it sparkles in the cup, when it goes down smoothly.

잠언 23:32.content: In the end, it bites like a snake, and poisons like a viper.

잠언 23:33.content: Your eyes will see strange things, and your mind will imagine confusing things.

잠언 23:34.content: Yes, you will be as he who lies down in the middle of the sea, or as he who lies on top of the rigging:

잠언 23:35.content: “They hit me, and I was not hurt! They beat me, and I don’t feel it! When will I wake up? I can do it again. I can find another.”
